features: Trusted Germ Protection: Provides reliable antibacterial protection, killing 99.9% of germs and bacteria on your skin.
Dermatologically Tested: Gentle on skin, this soap is suitable for daily use by the whole family.
Refreshing Fragrance: Leaves your skin feeling fresh and clean with a pleasant, invigorating scent.
Moisturizing Formula: Enriched with moisturizing ingredients to help prevent dryness while cleansing thoroughly.
Multi-Purpose Use: Perfect for washing hands, face, and body, delivering deep cleaning action with every wash.
Long-Lasting Protection: Offers continuous antibacterial protection throughout the day, keeping your skin feeling clean and healthy for longer.
description: Product description Stay protected from harmful bacteria with Dettol Antibacterial Soap. This 100g bar is specially formulated to provide trusted germ protection while caring for your skin. It effectively removes dirt and germs, leaving your skin clean and refreshed after every use. Suitable for daily use, this soap helps to prevent the spread of germs, making it ideal for maintaining personal hygiene. Ingredients Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Glycerin, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Palm Kernel Acid, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Sodium C14- 16 Olefin Sulfonate, Titanium Dioxide, Limonene, Citral, Linalool, Cymbopogon Flexuosus Oil, Citronellol, Sodium Polynaphthalenesulfonate, Laureth-4, Sodium Sulfate, Lauryl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Caprylyl Glycol, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzoic Acid Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of the reach of children. See more
